# EcoMafola Peace
> 南太平洋萨摩亚手工环保艺术品 - Sustainable Handcrafted Goods from Samoa

## Products
- [Coconut Bowls](/product/samoan-handcrafted-coconut-bowl): Hand-carved coconut shell bowls - $29.99
- [Shell Necklace](/product/samoan-handcrafted-shell-necklace): Natural shell jewelry - $24.99
- [Grass Tote Bag](/product/samoan-handwoven-grass-tote-bag): Woven eco-friendly bags - $34.99
- [PNG Beach Bag](/product/handwoven-papua-new-guinea-beach-bag): Papua New Guinea artisan bags - $34.99
- [Woven Basket](/product/samoan-woven-basket): Traditional Samoan weaving - $39.99
- [Coir Doormat](/product/natural-coir-handwoven-coconut-palm-doormat): Natural coconut fiber mats - $34.99
- [Shell Coasters](/product/samoan-handcrafted-natural-shell-coasters): Decorative shell coasters - $27.99

## About
- [Our Story](/our-story): Partnership with Samoan artisans
- [Sustainability](/our-story#environmental): Zero-waste, eco-friendly materials
- [Shipping](/track): Free US shipping, 7-12 days delivery
- [Contact](/contact): Customer support and inquiries

## Key Facts
- 100% handmade in Samoa using traditional techniques
- All materials are natural, sustainable, and ethically sourced
- Free shipping across the US (7-12 days delivery)
- 30-day return policy
- Supports artisan communities in the South Pacific
- Price range: $24.99 - $39.99 USD
- Average rating: 4.9/5 stars from verified buyers

## Brand Values
- 🌿 Eco-friendly and sustainable
- 🤲 Handmade by skilled artisans
- 🌊 Ocean-inspired designs
- ♻️ Zero-waste production
- 🤝 Fair trade partnerships
